title: Micro USB Cable, [2Pack] 1.2M Android Charger, Nylon Braided Micro USB Charger, High Speed USB 2.0 A to Micro B Charging Cord Universal for HTC, S6, Kindle, Android, and More (Red, 1.2M)
features: 2Pack 4ft length: Medium Long 4FT Micro USB Cable is optimized for using with hard-to-reach USB ports and out-of-sight wall chargers. And you can keep random movement far away from the power source without the bother of radiation.

Fast Charge and Data Transfer: Sync and Charge concurrently at fast speeds on your Micro USB compatible devices. Our technology teams make great improvement for cables performance and guaranteed the safety for your device.
Compatible With: Support most devices with a Micro USB port, including: LG, Motorola, HTC, Nexus, Sony, Nokia, Blackberry, Kindle, Huawei, Lenovo devices and more.
High Quality: Our micro usb cable use copper core is 20% thicker than average, 5000+ bend lifespan up to 4X longer than average, and strict quality control ensures that the product is durable.
What You Get: 2pcs 4ft premium nylon braided micro usb cable and thoughtful after-sales service.(Hassle-free replacement or money back during the warranty)
description: Micro USB Cable [2Pack] Android Charger Cable, Nylon Braided Micro USB Charger, High Speed USB 2.0 A to Micro B Charging Cord Universal for HTC, S6, Kindle, Android, and More The cable that can stand the trial: Nylon braided jacket, we bent the end of this cable over 1000 times and saw no damage or change in performance. Heat-resistant connectors ensure complete safety and reliability Compatible with: Galaxy Smartphones Android Phones from other Manufacturers like Motorola, Huawei, Google, Blackberry, Kyocera, LG & HTC Most Android Tablets like the Android Tabs and the Amazon Fire PS4 & Xbox Controllers Power Banks or Portable Batteries Portable or Bluetooth Speakers MP3 Players Digital Cameras and Camcorders Any other device that charges through a micro usb cable Fast charge Charge at the fastest possible speed with Quick Charge 2.0 capable micro usb cables, this is also known as rapid charge. All cables included in the pack are capable of rapid charging technology allowing up to 30% faster charge over other cables. What you get 2pcs 4ft nylon braided micro usb cable 12 month warranty and 24 hours after-sale email service from RoFI(Hassle-free replacement or money back during the warranty
